solutions.solution: (c) The numerical sequence is formed by the squares of 1, 2, 3 and 4. The numbers also mark the position of the letters A, D, I and P in the alphabetical series. These numbers and letters are present in zigzag pattern. As, A M 13 2, B S 14 3, N O 18 3 and R C 19 4, S T 20 4. Similarly, E U 21 5, F V 22 6. Hence, V will come in place of question mark.
(a) The pattern is as follows [detailed pattern with numbers and arrows shown]. Hence, option (a) is the correct answer
(d) Moving columnwise, we have D +2 → F +4 → H and M +3 → P +3 → S. Similarly, V +4 → Z +4 → D. So, missing character is D
(d) Moving clockwise, the pattern is as follows [detailed pattern with numbers]. So, missing character is D
(a) As, A +3 → D +4 → 8 and B +3 → F +4 → J. Similarly, K +3 → N +4 → R. Hence, option (a) is the correct answer
(c) Here, H = 8, B = 2 and 8 × 2 = 16 = P. Similarly, C = 3, F = 6 and 3 × 6 = 18 = R. Now, in column III, E = 5 and T = 20. ∴ ? = D such that 4 × 5 = 20
(b) Here, G 9 15, H I = O. Similarly, J 10 11 A + J = K, 5 13 18 E + M = R. Hence, option (b) is the correct answer.
(b) In each cell, pair of opposite letters is given. ∴ G +1 → H and opposite letter of H is S. ∴ HS will come in place of question mark.
(d) Consecutive letters occupy alternate positions in each row.
(d) The pattern in the question is Top part = KL (MN) OP Bottom part = DE (FG) HI ∴ H will come in place of question mark.

(c) There are four opposite letter pairs in the question and their sum is equal to 27. Pairs are as follows. AZ, DW, H ? and KP ∴ Letter opposite to H is S. Hence, S will come in place of question mark.

(c) In the given question, first skip one letter, then two letters to form the series in anti-clockwise direction. [diagram showing circular pattern] As, Q - N = 3 Similarly, N - 2 = L ∴ Hence, L will come in place of question mark.
(c) In the given question, the letters zigzag from top to bottom and bottom to top with a gap of one letter each time. Hence, I will come in place of question mark.
(d) The gaps between the top and bottom letters in each domino form the series 4, 6, 8, 10. The final gap will therefore be 10. ∴ ? = E + 10 ? = O
(b) The letters in the upper half of square have their corresponding position numbers in the second half (bottom) of square. ∴ ? = 13 = M

(b) The letters zigzag from top to bottom and have gaps of + 1, + 2, + 3, + 4 and + 5. The numbers are their respective position numbers in backward order. ∴ R, S, T, U, V, W, X 5 letters And position of X in backward order is 3. ∴ ? = 3 ? = X
(c) The letters in the upper half of the circle follow the sequence P (QR) S (TU) V (WX) Y and the numbers represent their respective positions in backward order. ∴ ? = Z
(d) According to the English alphabet, |(1 + 26) - (3 + 24) = 0| A Z C X (letter X is at 24th position in English alphabet)
